devicesContact - GetUpSoft Global
devicesGetUpSoft RD - Home Mobile
devicesOdoo ERP - GetUpSoft RD
devicesAI Agents - GetUpSoft Global
devicesOdoo ERP - GetUpSoft RD
devicesContacto - GetUpSoft RD
imageA premium, high-fidelity UI mockup of an Odoo ERP dashboard for a Dominican enterprise. Dark mode, deep charcoal and navy background. The dashboard shows elegant data visualizations: a clean line chart for sales, a bar chart for inventory levels, a table for accounts payable, and a status badge for 'DGII Compliance'. The style is ultra-professional, using glassmorphism, thin lines, and a mint teal accent (#99F6E4). No cartoonish elements. Minimalist and architectural. Space Grotesk typography. Background #0F1115.
devicesAI Agents - GetUpSoft Global
imageHigh-fidelity architecture diagram for Enterprise AI Agents. Central 'Intelligence Layer' node connecting to nodes for ERP, CRM, BI, APIs, and Cloud Infrastructure. Dark technical style, minimal lines, glow effects on nodes, professional indigo and teal palette. No cartoonish icons. Clean, thin lines with subtle data flow particles. Premium enterprise aesthetic like Palantir or IBM. Background #0F1115. Font Space Grotesk. Accent color #A5B4FC.
devicesAI Agents - GetUpSoft Global
imageHigh-fidelity architecture diagram for electronic invoicing (e-CF) process in Dominican Republic. Dark technical style, background #0F1115. Central flow showing 5 nodes: Emisión, Validación DGII, Firma Digital, Envío al cliente, and Archivo. Professional mint teal (#99F6E4) accents, thin lines, subtle glow, enterprise software aesthetic. Typography Space Grotesk. Minimalist, sober, premium.
devicesGetUpSoft Global - Homepage
imageGetUpSoft RD Logo
imageHigh-fidelity architecture diagram for Enterprise AI Agents. Central 'Intelligence Layer' node connecting to nodes for ERP, CRM, BI, APIs, and Cloud Infrastructure. Dark technical style, minimal lines, glow effects on nodes, professional navy/indigo/teal palette. No cartoonish icons. Clean, thin lines with subtle data flow particles. Premium enterprise aesthetic like Palantir or IBM. Background #0F1115. Font Space Grotesk. Accent color #A5B4FC.

imageHigh-fidelity architecture diagram for Enterprise AI Agents. Central 'Intelligence Layer' node connecting to nodes for ERP, CRM, BI, APIs, and Cloud Infrastructure. Dark technical style, minimal lines, subtle glow effects on nodes, professional indigo and teal palette. No cartoonish icons. Clean, thin lines with subtle data flow particles. imageHigh-fidelity architecture diagram for electronic invoicing (e-CF) process in Dominican Republic. Dark technical style, background #0F1115. Central flow showing 5 nodes with connecting lines: Emisión, Validación DGII, Firma Digital, Envío al cliente, and Archivo. Professional mint teal (#99F6E4) accents, thin lines, subtle glow, enterprise software aesthetic. Typography Space Grotesk. Minimalist, sober, premium. No text inside nodes, just clean icons. Title: PROCESO E-CF.

devicesGetUpSoft Global Mobile Homepage
imageHigh-fidelity architecture diagram for Enterprise AI Agents. Central 'Intelligence Layer' node connecting to nodes for ERP, CRM, BI, APIs, and Cloud Infrastructure. Dark technical style, minimal lines, glow effects on nodes, professional navy/indigo/teal palette. No cartoonish icons. Clean, thin lines with subtle data flow particles. Premium enterprise aesthetic like Palantir or IBM. Background #0F1115. Font Space Grotesk.
devicesOdoo ERP - GetUpSoft RD
devicesFacturación Electrónica - GetUpSoft RD
play_circlePrototype : GetUpSoft RD - Odoo ERP & Infrastructure
PrototypeDouble click to open
devicesProducts - GetUpSoft Global


Agent log
Prototype created
Press enter or space to select a node. You can then use the arrow keys to move the node around. Press delete to remove it and escape to cancel.
Press enter or space to select an edge. You can then press delete to remove it or escape to cancel.
